title: While The West Is Paling
content:
While the west is paling
    Starshine is begun.
    While the dusk is failing
    Glimmers up the sun.

    So, till darkness cover
    Life's retreating gleam,
    Lover follows lover,
    Dream succeeds to dream.

    Stoop to my endeavour,
    O my love, and be
    Only and for ever
    Sun and stars to me.

    1876
meaning:
William Ernest Henley's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "While The West Is Paling"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
